name: Sun-Dried Tomato Crostini
recipeIngredient: 8.5 oz Jar oil-pure sun-dried tomatoes (drain and chop)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the chopped sun-dried tomatoes, basil, capers, and lemon juice.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the sliced French bread.
3. Turn off the heat source.
4. Serve and enjoy.
